name: Robin
description: AI-powered second brain. Captures thoughts through conversation and structures them into a searchable knowledge base stored in Postgres.
readme: Provisions Postgres, Redis, the Robin core API, and the Robin wiki frontend. After first deploy, run `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;` on Postgres and fill `SERVER_PUBLIC_URL` / `WIKI_ORIGIN` with the generated Railway domains. See DEPLOY.md for full instructions.

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: BetterAuth session signing secret. 32+ random chars. Generate: openssl rand -base64 48

MASTER_KEY.description: Encrypts per-user KEKs. 64 hex chars (32 bytes). Generate: openssl rand -hex 32. LOSING THIS LOSES ALL USER DATA.

KEY_ENCRYPTION_SECRET.description: HMAC secret for MCP JWTs and worker tokens. 32+ random chars. Generate: openssl rand -base64 48

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key. Used as the default LLM provider for all AI tasks.

INITIAL_USERNAME.description: Bootstrap admin email. Created on first boot if no users exist.

INITIAL_PASSWORD.description: Bootstrap admin password. Rotate after first login.

SERVER_PUBLIC_URL.description: Core's public Railway URL (e.g. https://core-production.up.railway.app). Fill after first deploy, then redeploy.

WIKI_ORIGIN.description: Wiki's public Railway URL (e.g. https://wiki-production.up.railway.app). Comma-separated for multiple origins. Fill after first deploy, then redeploy.
